Scanner.description: The upstream scanner that produced the report (houba did not run it).
Scanner.title: Scanner

description: houba's normalized scan summary — the signed, verifiable form of `io.houba.scan.*`.

attested_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when houba attached and signed this scan. The freshness clock: an admission controller enforces a max-age policy against it (admit only if now - attested_at <= max-age). This signed field is the only trustworthy freshness source — not the unsigned scan-timestamp annotation (the HOUBA_LABEL_PREFIX-prefixed key, e.g. io.houba.scan.timestamp), which exists only for gc.
attested_at.title: Attested At

title: Scan attestation predicate (/scan/v1)
